name: Bruce Wayne
title: Posted about a book
content: Just started reading The Lean Startup. Taking some notes on building minimum viable products.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Shared a post
content: Does anyone have good recommendations for sci-fi books that explore advanced philosophical concepts? I recently finished Dune and want something similar.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Posted a review
content: I finally got around to reading Atomic Habits. I usually avoid self-help but the actionable advice in this one is actually really solid. Implementing the 2-minute rule today.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Posted about a book
content: I just finished The Metamorphosis by Kafka and feel honestly confused and disturbed. I'm wondering whether Gregor turning into an insect is meant to be taken literally or purely symbolically.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Added to Currently Reading
content: Starting my journey into classical literature today.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Shared a thought
content: The best thing about physical books is that you can actually see your progress visually as the bookmark moves further along. E-readers just don't give that same satisfaction.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Finished reading
content: Zero to One is a solid read if you are starting a company. The idea of competing in a monopoly rather than a crowded market is a controversial but interesting perspective.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Updated reading goal
content: I'm officially midway through my reading goal for the year! 25 books down, 25 to go. Let's see if I can make it before December.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Posted about a book
content: Rereading it hits completely differently when you are an adult compared to when it was assigned in high school.

name: Bruce Wayne
title: Joined a club
content: Just joined the 'Sci-Fi Enthusiasts' book club! Looking forward to diving into some deep space operas with everyone.
